calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-25-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Eric Throne. Jeffrey E. Margulies, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Better Property Management and Defendant, Patrick Rhone appeared in pro per. The case settled per written stipulation of the parties. Trial date is vacated.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-10-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
*DEFENDANT PATRICK RHONE'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT- O F F C A L E N D A R -- first amended complaint filed 2/13/03. Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, #4780 (DAG/301)
